title: Add public-site debug details without private data exposure (Golden Test 25)
problem: ticket-026 completes prompt-injection fixture handling, but Golden Test 25 requires the read-only public site to show richer debug/research detail without exposing raw prompts, private evaluator notes, local paths, full source text, API keys, hidden reasoning, or unreviewed draft claims.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 25: public site can display debug details without exposing private data.
docs/agents/10_SAFETY_MODEL.md sections 7-8: public export and public site safety.
acceptance_criteria: Card detail pages show public-safe debug details such as evidence type, public caveats, public source metadata, related cards, and public run timestamp.
No raw prompt text, private evaluator notes, local paths, full source text, API keys, hidden internal reasoning, or unreviewed draft claims render in public debug details.
non_goals: Do not add public write routes.
Do not expose local SQLite or local FastAPI.
Do not render raw HTML from card JSON.
